evidenceBoundary: Planning-owned structured handoff only. Historical execution evidence remains verbatim in report.md. Every changed behavior still requires focused red/green proof, the declared persistent regression, and the broader checkpoint. Controlled same-origin production-module tests are functional; E2E uses the real production route without request interception or fixture substitution.

acceptedTransitions.allowedEffect: Accept only the exact owner-settled marker-bounded current hunk and complete path identity without inferring Feature 010 test, scope, feature, or certification completion.
Retain the stable complete v2 identity, closed 13-path matrix, and all predecessor checks as mandatory byte-identical parser input; v3 alone supplies the active provenance interpretation.
Correct only hunk 1 committed-producer interpretation while preserving the current six-hunk identity, unknown current deletion author, all v2 contracts, and every false completion claim.
Retain exactly the approved tracked-clean transition while preserving the original prefix bytes and every other inherited fail-closed obligation.

unresolvedTransitions.requiredAction: Validate v2 by exact raw hash, parse the v3 correction with exact diff-body producer provenance and unchanged six-hunk identity, execute the direct canary, then replay the unchanged BUG-002 matrix without weakening inherited assertions.

commandCatalog.CMD-FIRST-RED: node -e 'const assert=require("node:assert/strict");const input=require("./tests/fixtures/fx-regime/commonjs-determinism-input.json");const sentinel=Object.freeze({owner:"preexisting-global"});globalThis.RLFX=sentinel;delete require.cache[require.resolve("./rlfx.js")];const RLFX=require("./rlfx.js");assert.strictEqual(globalThis.RLFX,sentinel);const first=RLFX.computeCurrencyDecision(structuredClone(input));const second=RLFX.computeCurrencyDecision(structuredClone(input));assert.equal(first.computedAt,input.decisionTime);assert.equal(second.computedAt,input.decisionTime);assert.equal(RLFX.canonicalize(first),RLFX.canonicalize(second));assert.equal(first.decisionId,second.decisionId);console.log("PASS RLFX CommonJS import preserves the existing global and explicit decisionTime is deterministic")'
commandCatalog.CMD-PAGE-FX: PAGE=fx-regime-relative-value-lab.html node -e 'const fs=require("node:fs");const p=process.env.PAGE;if(!p)throw new Error("PAGE is required");const h=fs.readFileSync(p,"utf8");const scripts=[...h.matchAll(/<script(?![^>]*\bsrc=)[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/script>/gi)].map(m=>m[1]).filter(s=>s.trim());if(!scripts.length)throw new Error("no inline script: "+p);scripts.forEach((s,i)=>{try{new Function(s)}catch(e){throw new Error("inline script "+(i+1)+": "+e.message)}});const ids=new Set([...h.matchAll(/\bid=["\x27]([^"\x27]+)["\x27]/g)].map(m=>m[1]));const refs=scripts.flatMap(s=>[...s.matchAll(/getElementById\(\s*["\x27]([^"\x27]+)["\x27]\s*\)/g)].map(m=>m[1]));const missing=[...new Set(refs.filter(id=>!ids.has(id)))];if(missing.length)throw new Error("missing ids: "+missing.join(", "));console.log("OK page="+p+" inline="+scripts.length+" refs="+refs.length)'
commandCatalog.CMD-PAGE-GLOBAL: PAGE=global-rotation-lab.html node -e 'const fs=require("node:fs");const p=process.env.PAGE;if(!p)throw new Error("PAGE is required");const h=fs.readFileSync(p,"utf8");const scripts=[...h.matchAll(/<script(?![^>]*\bsrc=)[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/script>/gi)].map(m=>m[1]).filter(s=>s.trim());if(!scripts.length)throw new Error("no inline script: "+p);scripts.forEach((s,i)=>{try{new Function(s)}catch(e){throw new Error("inline script "+(i+1)+": "+e.message)}});const ids=new Set([...h.matchAll(/\bid=["\x27]([^"\x27]+)["\x27]/g)].map(m=>m[1]));const refs=scripts.flatMap(s=>[...s.matchAll(/getElementById\(\s*["\x27]([^"\x27]+)["\x27]\s*\)/g)].map(m=>m[1]));const missing=[...new Set(refs.filter(id=>!ids.has(id)))];if(missing.length)throw new Error("missing ids: "+missing.join(", "));console.log("OK page="+p+" inline="+scripts.length+" refs="+refs.length)'
commandCatalog.CMD-PAGE-BRIEF: PAGE=market-brief.html node -e 'const fs=require("node:fs");const p=process.env.PAGE;if(!p)throw new Error("PAGE is required");const h=fs.readFileSync(p,"utf8");const scripts=[...h.matchAll(/<script(?![^>]*\bsrc=)[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/script>/gi)].map(m=>m[1]).filter(s=>s.trim());if(!scripts.length)throw new Error("no inline script: "+p);scripts.forEach((s,i)=>{try{new Function(s)}catch(e){throw new Error("inline script "+(i+1)+": "+e.message)}});const ids=new Set([...h.matchAll(/\bid=["\x27]([^"\x27]+)["\x27]/g)].map(m=>m[1]));const refs=scripts.flatMap(s=>[...s.matchAll(/getElementById\(\s*["\x27]([^"\x27]+)["\x27]\s*\)/g)].map(m=>m[1]));const missing=[...new Set(refs.filter(id=>!ids.has(id)))];if(missing.length)throw new Error("missing ids: "+missing.join(", "));console.log("OK page="+p+" inline="+scripts.length+" refs="+refs.length)'
commandCatalog.CMD-GLOBAL-CONSUMERS: git grep -n -E -e 'globalFxConfirm' -e 'fxWeight' -e 'fx\.score' -e 'currencyProxy' -e 'fxInverse' -- global-rotation-lab.html global-rotation-universe.json scripts/brief-refresh.mjs scripts/selftest.mjs notes/global-rotation-lab.md; exit_code=$?; echo "global_consumer_trace_exit=$exit_code"; [[ "$exit_code" -eq 1 ]]
commandCatalog.CMD-BRIEF-COMPOSITE: git grep -n -E -e 'compositeScore' -e 'mergedScore' -e 'fxCountryScore' -- market-brief.html rlbrief.js scripts/brief-refresh.mjs scripts/validate-brief-payload.mjs; exit_code=$?; echo "brief_composite_trace_exit=$exit_code"; [[ "$exit_code" -eq 1 ]]

tests.testTitle: RLFX broad dollar strength orientation and exact alignment contracts
tests.description: Production RLFX proves separated dollar states, official/proxy conflict, multi-peer independence, orientation, inverse deduplication, and exact-date exclusion.

tests.testTitle: RLFX cohort coverage and managed-currency eligibility contracts
tests.description: Production RLFX prevents pooled cohorts, managed favorable ranks, and neutral substitutes for missing peers.

tests.testTitle: RLFX evidence taxonomy conflict and carry-unwind contracts
tests.description: Production RLFX keeps typed evidence, clocks, conflicts, unavailable states, and multi-family unwind behavior independent.

tests.testTitle: RLFX rights gate strips restricted numeric values from public projections
tests.description: A rights-unclear numeric sentinel becomes unavailable and is absent from owner projections.

tests.testTitle: RLFX browser and CommonJS exports produce the same frozen decisions
tests.description: Identical production bytes and controlled inputs produce the same canonical deeply frozen decision in both runtimes.

tests.testTitle: Regression SCN-004-001 foundation: browser RLFX keeps Broad AFE and EME separate
tests.description: A real same-origin production route loads browser RLFX and retains three independent dollar states.

tests.testTitle: Regression SCN-004-002 foundation: browser RLFX names official proxy divergence without averaging
tests.description: Opposing official and proxy source records remain opposing in browser production code.

tests.testTitle: Regression SCN-004-003 foundation: rising one USD pair cannot fake broad currency strength
tests.description: A rising EURUSD edge cannot override weak EUR returns against unique non-USD peers.

tests.testTitle: Regression SCN-004-004 foundation: direct inverse pair relationship counts exactly once
tests.description: Direct and inverse sources produce one relationship and an unverifiable orientation has no value.

tests.testTitle: Regression SCN-004-005 foundation: unmatched newest dates are excluded and reported
tests.description: An adversarial newest leg is excluded from the exact intersection and retained in diagnostics.

tests.testTitle: Regression SCN-004-006 foundation: G10 and liquid EM ranks and candidates remain separate
tests.description: Cohort rankings and automatic candidates remain disjoint in browser production code.

tests.testTitle: Regression SCN-004-007 foundation: managed low volatility cannot auto-rank or auto-pair
tests.description: Managed/reference currencies remain non-comparable despite low observed volatility.

tests.testTitle: Regression SCN-004-008 foundation: insufficient peers produce no rank or neutral score
tests.description: Peer and coverage failures return a closed unavailable state and no numeric rank.

tests.testTitle: Regression SCN-004-009 foundation: momentum carry disagreement remains a named conflict
tests.description: Momentum and typed carry remain separate and reduce confidence through a named conflict.

tests.testTitle: Regression SCN-004-010 foundation: policy-rate proxy never renders executable carry
tests.description: Policy-rate evidence keeps proxy-only semantics throughout the public decision.

tests.testTitle: Regression SCN-004-011 foundation: market-implied carry requires instrument tenor clock and rights
tests.description: Incomplete market-implied carry lineage fails closed before calculation.

tests.testTitle: Regression SCN-004-012 foundation: cheap REER cannot create a tactical Candidate
tests.description: Slow value tension cannot overrule negative tactical trend by itself.

tests.testTitle: Regression SCN-004-013 foundation: positioning retains Tuesday as-of and Friday release clocks
tests.description: Delayed positioning clocks remain independent of newer spot observations.

tests.testTitle: Regression SCN-004-014 foundation: missing positioning cannot mean uncrowded
tests.description: Missing or inaccessible positioning supplies no crowding conclusion.

tests.testTitle: Regression SCN-004-015 foundation: high carry alone cannot activate carry unwind
tests.description: Carry-unwind state requires the complete disclosed multi-family condition.

tests.testTitle: Regression SCN-004-016 foundation: missing events preserve price and risk invalidation
tests.description: Event source absence does not remove market-derived invalidation.

tests.testTitle: Regression SCN-004-024 foundation: rights-unclear values stay out of owner projections
tests.description: A restricted numeric sentinel is absent from the browser projection returned by production RLFX.

tests.testTitle: complete Scope 1 foundation title set
tests.description: The complete current foundation browser set passes together with zero skipped cases before Scope 2.
tests.checkpointReason: Sequential browser gate before the first concrete overlay.

tests.description: All existing assertions remain and the design-recorded 345-pass baseline cannot lose a test.

tests.command: PAGE=fx-regime-relative-value-lab.html node -e 'const fs=require("node:fs");const p=process.env.PAGE;if(!p)throw new Error("PAGE is required");const h=fs.readFileSync(p,"utf8");const scripts=[...h.matchAll(/<script(?![^>]*\bsrc=)[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/script>/gi)].map(m=>m[1]).filter(s=>s.trim());if(!scripts.length)throw new Error("no inline script: "+p);scripts.forEach((s,i)=>{try{new Function(s)}catch(e){throw new Error("inline script "+(i+1)+": "+e.message)}});const ids=new Set([...h.matchAll(/\bid=["\x27]([^"\x27]+)["\x27]/g)].map(m=>m[1]));const refs=scripts.flatMap(s=>[...s.matchAll(/getElementById\(\s*["\x27]([^"\x27]+)["\x27]\s*\)/g)].map(m=>m[1]));const missing=[...new Set(refs.filter(id=>!ids.has(id)))];if(missing.length)throw new Error("missing ids: "+missing.join(", "));console.log("OK page="+p+" inline="+scripts.length+" refs="+refs.length)'

tests.command: node -e 'const assert=require("node:assert/strict");const input=require("./tests/fixtures/fx-regime/commonjs-determinism-input.json");const sentinel=Object.freeze({owner:"preexisting-global"});globalThis.RLFX=sentinel;delete require.cache[require.resolve("./rlfx.js")];const RLFX=require("./rlfx.js");assert.strictEqual(globalThis.RLFX,sentinel);const first=RLFX.computeCurrencyDecision(structuredClone(input));const second=RLFX.computeCurrencyDecision(structuredClone(input));assert.equal(first.computedAt,input.decisionTime);assert.equal(second.computedAt,input.decisionTime);assert.equal(RLFX.canonicalize(first),RLFX.canonicalize(second));assert.equal(first.decisionId,second.decisionId);console.log("PASS RLFX CommonJS import preserves the existing global and explicit decisionTime is deterministic")'

tests.testTitle: fx-regime-relative-value-lab.html inline script and literal IDs
tests.description: The page parses and every literal DOM target exists.
tests.command: PAGE=fx-regime-relative-value-lab.html node -e 'const fs=require("node:fs");const p=process.env.PAGE;if(!p)throw new Error("PAGE is required");const h=fs.readFileSync(p,"utf8");const scripts=[...h.matchAll(/<script(?![^>]*\bsrc=)[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/script>/gi)].map(m=>m[1]).filter(s=>s.trim());if(!scripts.length)throw new Error("no inline script: "+p);scripts.forEach((s,i)=>{try{new Function(s)}catch(e){throw new Error("inline script "+(i+1)+": "+e.message)}});const ids=new Set([...h.matchAll(/\bid=["\x27]([^"\x27]+)["\x27]/g)].map(m=>m[1]));const refs=scripts.flatMap(s=>[...s.matchAll(/getElementById\(\s*["\x27]([^"\x27]+)["\x27]\s*\)/g)].map(m=>m[1]));const missing=[...new Set(refs.filter(id=>!ids.has(id)))];if(missing.length)throw new Error("missing ids: "+missing.join(", "));console.log("OK page="+p+" inline="+scripts.length+" refs="+refs.length)'
